rationale: Clear, well-organized explainer that answers the prompt directly and uses strong examples to make the tax formula and year-to-year changes easy to follow. The voice is friendly and reader-aware, and the wording is concrete and precise. It loses a little on simplicity and economy because it is somewhat long and includes a few more technical terms than a strictly plain-English version needs.
